languages.text: {n}Вперед выступает коренастый блондин, облаченный в подобие брони Астра Милитарум, сделанной из древесной коры. На обезображенном ожогом лице застыло удивление и легкая растерянность.{/n} "Вот уж не думал, что мне доведется сказать такое, но... Доложите ваше звание, род занятий и цель прибывания в расположении полка!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Вперед выступает коренастый блондин, облаченный в подобие брони Астра Милитарум, сделанной из древесной коры. На обезображенном ожогом лице застыло удивление и легкая растерянность.{/n} "Вот уж не думал, что мне доведется сказать такое, но... Доложите ваше звание, род занятий и цель прибывания в расположении полка!"
traits.speaker: JanurZarkovSergeant

languages.text: {n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark. His burn-scarred face is frozen in an expression of surprise and slight bewilderment.{/n} "I never thought I'd have to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and reason for visiting this regiment's deployment!"
languages.original_text: {n}Вперед выступает коренастый блондин, облаченный в подобие брони Астра Милитарум, сделанной из древесной коры. На обезображенном ожогом лице застыло удивление и легкая растерянность.{/n} "Вот уж не думал, что мне доведется сказать такое, но... Доложите ваше звание, род занятий и цель прибывания в расположении полка!"

traits.locale_text: {n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark. An expression of surprise and slight bewilderment is frozen on his burn-scarred face.{/n} "I never thought I'd live to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and purpose for arriving in this regiment's deployment!"

{n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark. His burn-scarred face is frozen in an expression of surprise and slight bewilderment.{/n} "I never thought I'd have to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and reason for visiting this regiment's deployment!"

"Would you look at that — not commissar bullshit after all. There really are outsiders here. I thought I imagined it — just some rock falling out of the void. But no, it was a shuttle. Who might you be, then?"

"Would you look at that — not Commissar drivel after all. There really are outsiders here. I thought I imagined it — just some rock falling out of the void. But no, it was a shuttle. Who might you be, then?"

His burn-scarred face is frozen in an expression of surprise and slight bewilderment.{/n} "I never thought I'd have to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and reason for visiting this regiment's deployment!"

languages.text: 「まさか、コミッサーの嘘じゃない。本当に外からの者がいるんだ。私が想像しただけだと思っていた。ただ、空から岩が落ちてきただけだと思っていた。でも、それはシャトルだった。あなたは一体誰なのだろう？」
languages.original_text: "Would you look at that — not commissar bullshit after all. There really are outsiders here. I thought I imagined it — just some rock falling out of the void. But no, it was a shuttle. Who might you be, then?"

languages.text: {n}Ağaç kabuğundan yapılmış, Astra Militarum zırhını andıran bir şeyler giymiş, tıknaz sarışın bir adam öne çıkıyor. Yanık izleriyle dolu yüzüne şaşkınlık ve hafif bir sersemlik ifadesi yerleşmiş.{/n} "Bunu söylemem gerekeceğini hiç düşünmezdim ama... Rütbenizi, görevinizi ve bu alayın konuşlanma bölgesini ziyaret etme nedeninizi bildirin!"
languages.original_text: {n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark. His burn-scarred face is frozen in an expression of surprise and slight bewilderment.{/n} "I never thought I'd have to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and reason for visiting this regiment's deployment!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ağaç kabuğundan yapılmış, Astra Militarum zırhını andıran bir şeyler giymiş, tıknaz sarışın bir adam öne çıkıyor. Yanık izleriyle dolu yüzüne şaşkınlık ve hafif bir sersemlik ifadesi yerleşmiş.{/n} "Bunu söylemem gerekeceğini hiç düşünmezdim ama... Rütbenizi, görevinizi ve bu alayın konuşlanma bölgesini ziyaret etme nedeninizi bildirin!"

languages.text: {n}一个身材敦实的金发男人走上前来，身上穿着用树皮仿造的，勉强算是星界军风格的护甲。他满是烧伤的脸凝固着惊讶，还有些许困惑。{/n}“我真没想到有一天我会说出这句话，不过……报上你们的军衔、职务，以及造访军团驻地的理由！”
languages.original_text: {n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark. His burn-scarred face is frozen in an expression of surprise and slight bewilderment.{/n} "I never thought I'd have to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and reason for visiting this regiment's deployment!"

traits.locale_text: {n}一个身材敦实的金发男人走上前来，身上穿着用树皮仿造的，勉强算是星界军风格的护甲。他满是烧伤的脸凝固着惊讶，还有些许困惑。{/n}“我真没想到有一天我会说出这句话，不过……报上你们的军衔、职务，以及造访军团驻地的理由！”

languages.text: {n}Ein gedrungener blonder Mann mit einer aus Rinde gefertigten Rüstung des Astra Militarum tritt vor. Der Ausdruck in seinem verbrannten Gesicht ist eine Kombination aus Überraschung und Verwirrung.{/n} "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich das einmal sagen muss, aber ... Nennt Euren Rang, Eure Tätigkeit und den Grund Eures Besuchs bei dieser Regimentsabteilung!"
languages.original_text: {n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark. His burn-scarred face is frozen in an expression of surprise and slight bewilderment.{/n} "I never thought I'd have to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and reason for visiting this regiment's deployment!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein gedrungener blonder Mann mit einer aus Rinde gefertigten Rüstung des Astra Militarum tritt vor. Der Ausdruck in seinem verbrannten Gesicht ist eine Kombination aus Überraschung und Verwirrung.{/n} "Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich das einmal sagen muss, aber ... Nennt Euren Rang, Eure Tätigkeit und den Grund Eures Besuchs bei dieser Regimentsabteilung!"

languages.text: {n}Un blond trapu s'avance vers vous, revêtu d'une simili-armure de l'Astra Militarum reproduite avec de l'écorce d'arbre. Son visage marqué par d'anciennes brûlures est figé dans une expression de surprise mâtinée d'incompréhension.{/n} « Je n'aurais jamais cru dire ça un jour, mais... Veuillez décliner votre rang, votre profession et la raison qui vous amène ! »
languages.original_text: {n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark. His burn-scarred face is frozen in an expression of surprise and slight bewilderment.{/n} "I never thought I'd have to say this, but... State your rank, occupation, and reason for visiting this regiment's deployment!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Un blond trapu s'avance vers vous, revêtu d'une simili-armure de l'Astra Militarum reproduite avec de l'écorce d'arbre. Son visage marqué par d'anciennes brûlures est figé dans une expression de surprise mâtinée d'incompréhension.{/n} « Je n'aurais jamais cru dire ça un jour, mais... Veuillez décliner votre rang, votre profession et la raison qui vous amène ! »

languages.text: {n}Un hombre rubio, bajo y fornido, con algo similar a una armadura del Astra Militarum hecha de corteza de árbol, da un paso adelante. Su rostro quemado tiene una expresión de sorpresa inmutable.{/n} «Nunca pensé que diría esto, pero... ¡confirme su rango, ocupación y motivo por visitar este puesto del regimiento!».
languages.original_text: {n}A stocky blond man steps forward, clad in a semblance of Astra Militarum armour made of tree bark.
